## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (or n/a — explain why)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, settings, or setup changed (README / AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
